reproductiveEndocrineContext.plainEnglishMeaning: This is an educational endocrine boundary report. It can document what evidence is missing and how the sample report is structured, but it cannot diagnose or guide care.
unsupportedClaims: Treatment, supplement, diet, lifestyle, medication, or actionability guidance
reproductiveEndocrineContext.professionalReview: Endocrine concerns require appropriate labs, clinical context, and qualified clinician review.
